title: Eden Elephants 5's League kicking off
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Eden Elephants 5s League is kicking off the 2026 hockey season from 6 to 27 February, every Friday at the De Jagers Sport Complex.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Eden Elephants 5s League is kicking off the 2026 hockey season from 6 to 27 February, every Friday at the De Jagers Sport Complex."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This fast-paced and fun competition is designed to build skills, confidence, and love for the game."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This event is hosted by Oudtshoorn Elephants Hockey Club and sponsored by Princess Hockey.","html":"This event is hosted by Oudtshoorn Elephants Hockey Club and sponsored by Princess Hockey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The League will take place over four weeks.","html":"The League will take place over four weeks.
"},{"type":"heading","text":"Game times","level":"h3"},{"type":"list","items":["Ages 6 to 12, 15:00 - 16:00","Ages 13 to 18, 16:00 - 17:00"],"ordered":false},{"type":"heading","text":"Team format","level":"h3"},{"type":"list","items":["Teams consist of seven players, with five players on the pitch and two rolling substitutes."],"ordered":false},{"type":"heading","text":"Finals day","level":"h3"},{"type":"list","items":["The Championship finals will take place at the end of the league, 1st vs 2nd, and the play-off finals, 3rd vs 4th."],"ordered":false},{"type":"heading","text":"Registration","level":"h3"},{"type":"list","items":["All players must register and pay via the Elephants Outdoor Hockey Club."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Click on this link to register.","html":"Click on this link to register."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
